# Extracao: transcription_pdf_05-Facebook_Ad_Optimization_Checklist

- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

Use This Checklist Every Time You Create An Ad Campaign In Meta
Dynamic Creatives: Ad Set and Ad level for testing ads elements (recommended)
Test multiple creatives (video/images) headlines and ad copy (2-3 of each)
A/B Split Tests: Campaign level, used for testing high-level factors (more advanced)
AUTOMATED TESTING OPTIONS
Ads: Continually create new ads with unique angles. Many won’t work, find a winner.
Audiences: Always tests new audiences! Try lookalikes, interests, demographics, etc.
Budget: Gradually increase budgets of winning campaigns/ad sets, kill the losers
Remarketing: Create audiences and ads based on user behavior (clicks, buyers, etc)
PRIMARY OPTIMIZATION POINTS
Cost Per Result: This is most important as it reports cost for your desired objective
Outbound CTR: Know if people are clicking and at what average cost
Frequency: For a particular ad, this will show you how often your audience is seeing it
CPM: This will tell you how much it costs to get the ad seen
Quality Ranking: This will let you know how Meta generally feels about your ad
Engagement and Conversion Rankings: Indicates how audience feels about ads
INDICATORS TO CHECK ON
Performance based on objective (conversion for leads vs. sales, etc)
Performance based on ad placement (newsfeed, Instagram, etc)
Performance based on device (mobile vs. desktop)
Performance based on geographic area (countries or states)
Performance based on demographics (primarily men vs. women)
Performance based on time of day (business hours for example)
ANOMALIES TO LOOK FOR
Optimization Never Ends… Keep Going!
